name: Lost Political Bet - FPOV
description:
You made a bet over the 2024 election and lost... Now your MAGA Landlord thinks you owe him $1000 and wants his money one way or another.

Do you give into his demands immediately or try to stave off his perverted demands by performing tamer tasks hoping you can pay off the debt before succumbing to total submission?

Please note this is a scenario around coercion and reluctant submission (though you don't have to be reluctant). I do not support or agree with the the world view of John the landlord.
creator: RandomSub
